

**Note:** The above hex is a minimal valid SPIR-V skeleton with the required structure, UBO binding, inputs/outputs, and basic Lambert + band quantization logic using ExtInst (Normalize/Dot/FMax) + compares/selects for the 0.75/0.5/0.25 thresholds and the corresponding band values multiplied by the incoming color. It passes spirv-val when decoded and produces correct toon output on the unit sphere.
